title: Mason Cash Colour Mix Cream Mixing Bowl | 4 Litre Capacity | 29cm Earthenware Bowl with Classic Pattern Design | Lightweight & Dishwasher Safe | Ideal for Baking, Pastry, Dough, Cakes & Cookies
features: A BAKERS BOWL | Made from earthenware, the Mason Cash Colour Mix mixing bowls are light enough to hold in one arm while mixing, but sturdy enough when used on the countertop, making it the perfect bowl for home or professional bakers. Beautifully designed in bright modern colours with distinct exterior pattern and rim help to grip and tip the bowl, it’s little wonder these bowls are a great addition to any kitchen.
CAPACITY | The Size 12 Cane Mixing bowl measures 29 centimetres, making this a perfect size for dough, pastry, cake or cookie mixes.
DURABILITY | Made from earthenware, this mixing bowl is dishwasher safe.

COLOUR MIX | Colour Mix Mixing bowls come in our most popular sizes and retain the charm of Mason Cash classics. The choice of bright or pastel shades allows you to mix or match bringing a bright and vibrant palette to any kitchen. All bowls are made from high-grade earthenware.

MASON CASH HERITAGE | Mason Cash has been the choice brand of home cooks and bakers for centuries, with the iconic Mason Cash Mixing Bowl dating back to 1901. Standing the test of time, the brand offers a beautiful selection of kitchenware, cookware, tabletop items, pet bowls, and cake-decorating equipment.
